name: Westex Community
description_short: WesTex Community Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving West Texas with multiple branches offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards to eligible members.
description_long:
WesTex Community Credit Union (WCCU) is a federally-insured credit union operating under NCUA oversight with NMLS# 929926. The institution serves communities across West Texas with four physical branch locations in Kermit, Pecos, Alpine, and Monahans, providing traditional credit union services to its membership base.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including deposit accounts (checking, savings, certificates of deposit), consumer loans (auto loans from 4.74% APR, personal loans from 10.74% APR, recreational loans from 7.94% APR), mortgage loans starting at 7.16% APR, and WCCU VISA credit cards from 7.90% APR. They provide online banking, e-statements, ATM/debit card access, remote deposit, wire transfers (international and domestic), and specialized services like payment assistance and skip-a-payment options. The credit union also offers a Kids Club savings account, student loans, and mortgage loan appointments with guidance on the home buying process.

WesTex distinguishes itself through localized service with bilingual staff, student scholarships, notary services, safe deposit boxes at participating locations, and personalized mortgage loan consultations. Their online loan application system allows members to apply for various loan products remotely. The institution emphasizes accessibility and maintains current technology infrastructure for secure online banking.

As a credit union, WCCU member savings are federally insured up to at least $250,000 and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. The organization positions itself as an equal opportunity housing lender. However, membership eligibility requirements and specific service availability at individual branches are not fully detailed on the website. Loan rates are subject to change and based on creditworthiness and loan term.
services: Savings accounts and Certificates of Deposit
pros: Federally insured deposits up to $250,000 through NCUA backing
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.74% APR
Multiple physical branch locations across West Texas with extended accessibility
Bilingual staff available for member service
Student scholarships and Kids Club account for family financial education
Flexible loan options including payment assistance and skip-a-payment programs
Online loan application and remote deposit capabilities for convenience
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to West Texas (4 branches only)
Membership eligibility criteria not transparently disclosed on website
Personal loan rates relatively high at 10.74% APR minimum
Mortgage rates at 7.16% APR not particularly competitive in current market
Limited information about credit union membership requirements or field of membership
best_for: West Texas residents and workers seeking local, member-owned banking with personalized service
Borrowers with good-to-excellent credit seeking competitive auto loan rates under 5%
Families wanting to build financial literacy through Kids Club savings programs
Homebuyers in the service area seeking mortgage consultation and guidance
diagnosis: WesTex Community Credit Union is best for West Texas residents seeking a member-owned alternative to traditional banks with competitive loan rates and personalized local service. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership and services are restricted to four branches in West Texas, making this unsuitable for customers outside the service area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Westex Community — Credit Union in Kermit, TX | CreditDoc
meta_description: Westex Community — NCUA-insured credit union in Kermit, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
